posts.title: Your Under-Eye Area Ages 3x Faster Than the Rest of Your Face — Start Here
posts.excerpt: The skin under your eyes is 0.5mm thin — 5x thinner than your cheeks. Most people start eye care a decade too late. Dot & Key's ophthalmologist-tested formulas and exactly when to start using them.

posts.title: Why 90% of Vitamin C Serums Oxidise Before They Reach Your Skin — And How to Pick One That Doesn't
posts.excerpt: Vitamin C is the most overhyped and under-delivered ingredient in skincare. We explain the oxidation problem, the concentration sweet spot, and what makes Dot & Key's formulation different.

posts.title: Body Skincare Is Having Its Moment in India — Here's Everything You're Missing Below the Neck
posts.excerpt: Searches for body serums, body SPF, and body exfoliants have tripled since 2024. We break down why the body care revolution is real and build a complete routine from scratch.

posts.title: The Science Behind Dot & Key's Watermelon Range — Not Just a Pretty Pink Jar
posts.excerpt: Watermelon extract contains lycopene, citrulline, and amino acids with measurable anti-inflammatory effects. We asked our formulation team to break down exactly why it works — and in which concentration.

posts.title: Post-Acne Marks vs True Hyperpigmentation — Most Indians Treat the Wrong One
posts.excerpt: PIE, PIH, and melasma look similar but need completely different treatments. Getting this wrong means months of wasted products. Here's how to diagnose which one you have in 60 seconds.

posts.title: The Dot & Key AM/PM Split Routine — Built for India's Climate, Pollution, and Skin
posts.excerpt: Morning and night skin have different needs. Here's the exact AM/PM protocol our dermatology advisors recommend for urban Indian skin — including which Dot & Key products go where and why.
